name: skill-map-monorepo
description: skill-map monorepo — houses the public spec and the reference implementation.

scripts.smoke:demo: npm run demo:build && npm run test:smoke --workspace=skill-map-e2e
scripts.demo:build: npm run build --workspace=ui && node scripts/build-demo-dataset.js && cp -R ui/dist/ui/browser/. web/demo/ && node scripts/patch-demo-mode.js
scripts.web:docker: npm run web:docker:build && npm run web:docker:run
scripts.validate:all: npm run typecheck && npm run lint --workspaces --if-present && npm run spec:check && npm run spec:pin:check && npm run cli:check && npm run test --workspace=@skill-map/cli && npm run test --workspace=@skill-map/testkit && npm run test:ci --workspace=ui && npm run build --workspace=@skill-map/cli && npm run build --workspace=ui
scripts.test:all: npm run test --workspace=@skill-map/cli && npm run test --workspace=@skill-map/testkit && npm run test:ci --workspace=ui
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage --workspace=@skill-map/cli && npm run test:coverage --workspace=@skill-map/testkit
scripts.changeset:version: changeset version && npm run spec:pin && npm run spec:index && npm run cli:reference
